title: goodenia fordiana
intro: Goodenia fordiana, also known as Ford's Goodenia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Goodeniaceae, native to the eastern coast of Australia. Traditionally, the leaves and stems of Goodenia fordiana have been used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including the potential to reduce fever, alleviate rheumatism, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, Goodenia fordiana is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
